diagrams.title: Decision Tree for Sorting 3 Elements
diagrams.description: Shows minimum height decision tree to sort 3 elements requiring 3 comparisons in worst case
elements: Root node: Compare a and b
Left branch: a ≤ b; Right branch: a > b
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how comparisons lead to sorted outcomes and count minimum leaves needed

diagrams.title: Binary Search Decision Tree
diagrams.description: Decision tree for searching in sorted array of 4 elements
elements: Leaves: Found (4 outcomes) or Not Found (1 outcome)
diagrams.purpose: Show optimal search tree structure achieving ⌈log₂(n+1)⌉ height

diagrams.title: Stirling's Approximation Visualization
diagrams.description: Graph showing log₂(n!) vs n log₂ n - 1.44n approximation accuracy
diagrams.purpose: Understand the approximation used in lower bound derivation

diagrams.title: Comparison-Based Sort Lower Bound Tree
diagrams.description: Generic decision tree showing n! leaves and minimum height calculation
elements: Shows relationship between comparisons and outcomes
diagrams.purpose: Visual proof that sorting requires Ω(n log n) comparisons
